violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was (0) parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be (200-400) ppm. PIC changed out sanitizer and refilled sanitizer (200) ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

The (floor behind food boilers) in the (kitchen) area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
Equipment was observed stored in close proximity to a hand sink. Equipment must be stored in a manner that protects from splash and spill. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024
The ceiling and ceiling vents above the ware-washing and food prep areas were observed with an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site certified food safety manager certified with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023

Thermometers are lacking in multiple refrigeration units. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023
Wet equipment was stored on top of each other not allowing to air dry. Equipment/utensils must be allowed to air dry. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023
